message:
fix(codegen): Multiple fixes for tuple test compilation

1. Global variable type lookup: Allow global var_types lookup from within
   functions to fix `failed or JUST_SHOW_HASH_RESULTS` generating pyOr
   instead of simple `or` for two bool operands.

2. itertools.product with repeat: Generate inline N-nested loops instead
   of calling runtime.productRepeat. This handles all element types
   (i64, f64, PyValue, u8) by using @TypeOf inference.

3. collections inline codegen: Changed collections from direct_import to
   inline codegen to avoid unused Counter const warning.

4. itertools inline codegen: Changed itertools from direct_import to
   inline codegen so product() calls go through genProduct.

5. Added genProductWithRepeat for product(iter, repeat=N) pattern.

6. Extended genProduct to handle 3 iterables (product(A, B, C)).

The tuple test now compiles and runs (fails on runtime assertion, not
compile error).
